# createShortGuid

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether to create a short GUID for sharing this record.

## Declaration

```swift
attribute boolean? createShortGuid;
```

## Discussion

A short GUID is a global unique identifier for this record that’s used for sharing.
title: createShortGuid
